name: oriflux
description: Oriflux by Sponge Theory — read-only web + product + API analytics in Claude Code (traffic, sessions, geography, API health), queried through Oriflux's typed metric registry, via your Oriflux instance.

base_url.title: Oriflux API base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Oriflux API instance (cloud or self-host), without /mcp — e.g. https://api.oriflux.sponge-theory.dev. Leave the default unless you self-host or the hosted instance is not yet live.

api_key.title: Oriflux read key (ofx_read_…)
api_key.description: A read-scoped Oriflux API key (ofx_read_…), issued per organization in the Oriflux dashboard. Read keys can only query analytics — they cannot write. Shown once at creation.
